calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: SD-029 event-conditioned comparator: reef substrate (Bug 1+2 fix)
items.notes: Corrected rerun: Bug 1 BreathOscillator disabled (breath_period=0), Bug 2 _committed_step_idx saturation in non-bistable path. Both bugs now fixed in ree_core.

items.title: EXQ-536 goal seeding diagnostic: per-step instrumentation (H_a/H_b/H_c dispatch)
items.notes: Diagnostic follow-on to EXQ-536 (z_goal_active_fraction=0.0). Single seed, training-light, instrumented eval logs benefit / drive / effective_benefit / z_goal.norm() per step. Dispatches three candidate root causes: H_a drive-collapse-on-contact, H_b threshold never crossed, H_c update fires but z_goal does not grow. evidence_direction=non_contributory.

items.title: EXQ-536 goal seeding diagnostic: z_goal_inject force-arm (commit chain probe)
items.notes: Diagnostic follow-on to EXQ-536. 2 arms x 3 seeds. ARM_0 cfg.goal.z_goal_inject=0.0 (replicates EXQ-536 ARM_1); ARM_1 cfg.goal.z_goal_inject=0.3 (MECH-188 action-time z_goal norm floor) bypasses persistent-state seeding. Isolates whether the EXQ-536 approach_commit_rate=0.0 collapse is upstream (z_goal seeding) or downstream (commit chain inert even with active z_goal). evidence_direction=non_contributory.

items.title: SD-029/MECH-256 single-pass comparator residual (replaces 535a two-pass)
items.notes: Replaces the EXQ-535a two-pass cf_gap with the SD-029/MECH-256 spec single-pass residual ||z_obs - E2(z_prev, a_actual)||. ARM_0 baseline dropped (no ext events). ARM_1 intact + ARM_2 action-scrambled falsification. P2 graduation raised to 0.85 with interventional training (SD-013) enabled. C1 forward_r2 threshold relaxed to 0.85 to accommodate reef_food_ext-induced noise on R^2.
